title: Moderation update: abuse queue triage
body: Handled today’s high-severity abuse reports. Banned spam_wave_42 for validated phishing-link spam across multiple channels and banned toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. Closed the associated reports after action. Also reviewed a high-severity report against core_maintainer and took no sanction because it was a validated false positive/brigading case. Summary posted; triage stopped here as requested.
